summary: Verified both caregiver workflow bug fixes: (1) Pending caregiver invite redirect after OAuth login - LandingPage and PhoneSetupPage now correctly check localStorage for 'pending_caregiver_invite' and redirect to /invite/{token}, (2) OneSignal Web Push for caregivers - CaregiverDashboardPage and CaregiverAcceptPage now initialize OneSignal Web SDK for non-native (browser) users. All 21 backend API tests passed. All 4 frontend tests passed.

verification: ✅ LandingPage.jsx lines 119-132: Checks localStorage for 'pending_caregiver_invite' after OAuth login
✅ LandingPage.jsx: If pendingInvite exists and profile is complete, redirects to /invite/{token}
✅ LandingPage.jsx: If pendingInvite exists but profile incomplete, redirects to /phone-setup (invite kept in localStorage)
✅ PhoneSetupPage.jsx lines 63-70: After phone setup, checks for pending invite and redirects to /invite/{token}
✅ CaregiverDashboardPage.jsx lines 45-55: Initializes OneSignal Web SDK for non-native users
✅ CaregiverAcceptPage.jsx lines 52-58: Initializes OneSignal Web SDK after successful acceptance
✅ oneSignalWebService.js: Loads OneSignal Web SDK v16 from CDN
✅ oneSignalWebService.js: Calls OneSignal.login(userId) to set external_id for targeting

findings: ✅ Line 128: Priority check - pendingInvite with complete profile redirects to invite page
✅ Line 138-142: New users go to phone-setup, pending invite is preserved in localStorage
✅ Line 64: Gets pendingInvite from localStorage after phone setup
✅ Line 65-67: If pendingInvite exists, redirect to /invite/{token}
✅ Lines 45-55: useEffect initializes OneSignal for browser users
✅ Lines 52-58: Initializes OneSignal after successful acceptance
✅ initAndLogin(userId): Initializes SDK and calls OneSignal.login(userId)

test_credentials.note: Google OAuth required for full end-to-end caregiver flow testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both caregiver workflow bugs are verified as fixed: (1) After login, LandingPage checks localStorage for pending_caregiver_invite and redirects to /invite/{token}. PhoneSetupPage does the same after profile setup. (2) OneSignal Web SDK is initialized for caregivers in CaregiverDashboardPage and CaregiverAcceptPage for browser users. The OneSignalSDKWorker.js service worker is correctly served from /public/. Note: Full end-to-end testing of caregiver invite flow requires Google OAuth which cannot be automated. Manual test: Create invite as patient → Copy WhatsApp link → Open in incognito → Login as different user → Should redirect to invite acceptance page after login.
